untranslatable_reason: Cup pattern detection requires custom pattern recognition (lowest low, right cup lip high, U-shaped volume shape classification, volume trend direction over time) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators. The signal requires identifying: (1) multi-bar cup formation geometry, (2) volume trend direction (falling vs rising), (3) volume shape classification (U-shaped), and (4) breakout volume assessment (light vs heavy). These require historical pattern analysis beyond available indicators.
translation_notes: Signal contains rich contextual parameters (68% success rate in bull, 34% average rise, 9% failure rate at 5% decline, volume shape and trend conditions) but the core entry mechanism—identifying and measuring a cup pattern with specific volume characteristics—requires custom pattern recognition logic. Breakout volume can partially be approximated with volume > hvol_20, and exit uses the measure rule concept (34% average rise). Market regime context (BULL_MARKET vs BEAR_MARKET) is noted but cannot be directly evaluated with allowed indicators.
